C:\Users\Administrator\Desktop\dsc_nx4\ST02_LH_SAB\FrmMain.vb 파일에서:
1. Serial_Scanner_DataReceived 핸들러의 wStep 스캔 판정 부분 전체 코드와 줄번호 (바코드 스캔 판정하는 곳 전부)
2. Serial_Tool 관련 DataReceived 핸들러에서 토크 판정 부분 (wStep 체크하는 곳) 전체 코드와 줄번호

정확한 줄번호와 코드를 알려줘. 코드 수정은 하지 마.

content.content:
2575→    Private Sub ThreadTaskAtlasTool1() 'OTHER
  2576→
  2577→        Dim buffsize As Integer
  2578→        Dim InStream1(1024) As Byte
  2579→        Dim temp1 As String = ""
  2580→        Dim ToolData As Double
  2581→        Dim ToolDecision As String
  2582→
  2583→        tooldataOther.Text = "?"
  2584→
  2585→        Do
  2586→            Try
  2587→                ClientSocketTool1.ReceiveBufferSize = 1024
  2588→                buffsize = ClientSocketTool1.ReceiveBufferSize
  2589→                ServerStreamTool1.Read(InStream1, 0, InStream1.Length)
  2590→                Dim Returndata As String = System.Text.Encoding.Default.GetString(InStream1)
  2591→                For i As Integer = 1 To Len(Returndata)
  2592→                    temp1 = temp1 & "" & Chr(Asc(Mid(Returndata, i, 1)))
  2593→                Next i
  2594→                tooldataOther.Text = temp1
  2595→                If Mid(temp1, 5, 4) = "0002" Then
  2596→                    Tool1ConnectionStep = 2
  2597→                ElseIf temp1.Contains("0061001") Then
  2598→                    ToolData = CDbl(Mid(temp1, 141, 4) & "." & Mid(temp1, 145, 2))
  2599→                    If Mid(temp1, 108, 1) = "1" Then
  2600→                        ToolDecision = "OK"
  2601→                    Else
  2602→                        ToolDecision = "NG"
  2603→                    End If
  2604→                    RequestTool1Data("0020" & "0062" & "001" & "0" & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(0))
  2605→                    'tooldataOther.Text = ToolData
  2606→
  2607→                    If wStep1 = 9 And srcSAB_BArcode_DEc.Text = "OK" Then
  2608→                        If srcSAB_TQ1_DEC.Text <> "OK" And srcSAB_TQ2_DEC.Text <> "OK" Then
  2609→                            srcSAB_TQ1.Text = CStr(ToolData)
  2610→                            If ToolData >= BASIC_SAB_TQ_MIN And ToolData <= BASIC_SAB_TQ_MAX And ToolDecision = "OK" Then
  2611→                                srcSAB_TQ1_DEC.Text = "OK"
  2612→                                srcSAB_TQ1_DEC.BackColor = Color.Blue
  2613→                                DingDOng()
  2614→                            Else
  2615→                                srcSAB_TQ1_DEC.Text = "NG"
  2616→                                srcSAB_TQ1_DEC.BackColor = Color.Red
  2617→                                NG()
  2618→                            End If
  2619→                        ElseIf srcSAB_TQ1_DEC.Text = "OK" And srcSAB_TQ2_DEC.Text <> "OK" Then
  2620→                            srcSAB_TQ2.Text = CStr(ToolData)
  2621→                            If ToolData >= BASIC_SAB_TQ_MIN And ToolData <= BASIC_SAB_TQ_MAX And ToolDecision = "OK" Then
  2622→                                srcSAB_TQ2_DEC.Text = "OK"
  2623→                                srcSAB_TQ2_DEC.BackColor = Color.Blue
  2624→                                srcSAB_TQ_DEc.Text = "OK"
  2625→                                srcSAB_TQ_DEc.BackColor = Color.Blue
  2626→                                DingDOng()
  2627→                            Else
  2628→                                srcSAB_TQ2_DEC.Text = "NG"
  2629→                                srcSAB_TQ2_DEC.BackColor = Color.Red
  2630→                                NG()
  2631→                            End If
  2632→                        End If
  2633→
  2634→                    End If
  2635→
  2636→                End If
  2637→                temp1 = ""
  2638→            Catch ex As Exception
  2639→            End Try
  2640→            Application.DoEvents()
  2641→        Loop
  2642→
  2643→    End Sub

  2731→    Private Sub Serial_Resist_DataReceived(ByVal sender As System.Object, ByVal e As System.IO.Ports.SerialDataReceivedEventArgs) Handles Serial_Resist.DataReceived
  2732→        Dim Incoming3 As String

  2737→

  2746→                            'LABEL_Left_Resist.Text = "No Connection"
  2747→                        Else
  2748→                            If Mid$(tmp, 9, 3) = "-03" Then
  2749→                                Left_Resist_Value = Val(Mid$(tmp, 2, 5)) / 100
  2750→                                LABEL_Left_Resist.Text = Format(Left_Resist_Value + LEFT_RESIST_OFFSET, "0.00")
  2751→                                lblResist.Text = LABEL_Left_Resist.Text
  2752→                            ElseIf Mid$(tmp, 9, 3) = "+00" Then
  2753→                                Left_Resist_Value = Val(Mid$(tmp, 2, 5))
  2754→                                LABEL_Left_Resist.Text = Format(Left_Resist_Value + LEFT_RESIST_OFFSET, "0.00")

  2761→                                    DingDOng()
  2762→                                    Label_Left_ResistTest_Dec.Text = "OK"
  2763→                                    Label_Left_ResistTest_Dec.BackColor = Color.Blue
  2764→                                    WritePlc("D", "4668", "1")
  2765→                                    ResistStep = 1
  2766→                                End If
  2767→                            Catch ex As Exception
  2768→
  2769→                            End Try
  2770→
  2771→                        End If
  2772→                        Left_Resist_Send = False
  2773→                    End If
  2774→

content.text:
완벽합니다. 정확한 줄번호와 코드를 정리해서 드립니다.

## 1. Serial_Scanner_Other_DataReceived - wStep 바코드 스캔 판정 (바코드 스캔 전부)

**줄 2453~2488: Serial_Scanner_Other_DataReceived 핸들러**

```vb
Private Sub Serial_Scanner_Other_DataReceived(ByVal sender As Object, ByVal e As System.IO.Ports.SerialDataReceivedEventArgs) Handles Serial_Scanner_Other.DataReceived

    Dim Incoming As String
    Dim GetData As String
    Dim ScanData As String

    Incoming = Serial_Scanner_Other.ReadLine()
    GetData = Mid$(Incoming, 1, Len(Incoming) - 1)
    ScanData = GetData
    Try
        ScandataOTHER.Text = ScanData
        If wStep1 = 8 Then                                                        ' ← wStep 판정 시작
            If ScanData.Contains(srcSAB_BArcode_Target.Text) = True Then
                If FLAG_SAB_DUP AndAlso CheckDuplicate("TABLE_MAIN_LH", "SAB_SERIAL", ScanData) = True Then
                    srcSAB_BArcode.Text = ScanData
                    srcSAB_BArcode_DEc.Text = "NG"
                    srcSAB_BArcode_DEc.BackColor = Color.Red
                    NG()
                Else
                    srcSAB_BArcode.Text = ScanData
                    srcSAB_BArcode_DEc.Text = "OK"
                    srcSAB_BArcode_DEc.BackColor = Color.Blue
                    DingDOng()
                End If
            Else
                srcSAB_BArcode.Text = ScanData
                srcSAB_BArcode_DEc.Text = "NG"
                srcSAB_BArcode_DEc.BackColor = Color.Red
                NG()
            End If
        End If                                                                   ' ← wStep 판정 끝
    Catch ex As Exception
        Serial_Scanner_Other.DiscardInBuffer()
    End Try
        
End Sub
```

**핵심 부분:**
- **줄 2464**: `If wStep1 = 8 Then` - wStep 판정 시작
- **줄 2465**: `If ScanData.Contains(srcSAB_BArcode_Target.Text) = True Then` - 타겟 바코드 포함 여부 확인
- **줄 2466~2470**: 타겟 일치 + 중복체크(`FLAG_SAB_DUP`) - 중복이면 NG, 아니면 OK
- **줄 2477~2481**: 타겟 미일치 - NG 판정
- **줄 2483**: `End If` - wStep 판정 종료

---

## 2. Serial_Scanner_DIVE_DataReceived - wStep 바코드 스캔 판정 (동일 구조)

**줄 2416~2451: Serial_Scanner_DIVE_DataReceived 핸들러**

```vb
Private Sub Serial_Scanner_DIVE_DataReceived(ByVal sender As Object, ByVal e As System.IO.Ports.SerialDataReceivedEventArgs) Handles Serial_Scanner_DIVE.DataReceived

    Dim Incoming As String
    Dim GetData As String
    Dim ScanData As String

    Incoming = Serial_Scanner_DIVE.ReadLine()
    GetData = Mid$(Incoming, 1, Len(Incoming) - 1)
    ScanData = GetData
    Try
        ScandataDIVE.Text = ScanData
        If wStep2 = 8 Then                                                        ' ← wStep 판정 시작
            If ScanData.Contains(srcSAB_BArcode_Target2.Text) = True Then
                If FLAG_SAB_DUP AndAlso CheckDuplicate("TABLE_MAIN_LH", "SAB_SERIAL", ScanData) = True Then
                    srcSAB_BArcode2.Text = ScanData
                    srcSAB_BArcode_DEc2.Text = "중복"
                    srcSAB_BArcode_DEc2.BackColor = Color.Blue
                    NG()
                Else
                    srcSAB_BArcode2.Text = ScanData
                    srcSAB_BArcode_DEc2.Text = "OK"
                    srcSAB_BArcode_DEc2.BackColor = Color.Blue
                    DingDOng()
                End If
            Else
                srcSAB_BArcode2.Text = ScanData
                srcSAB_BArcore_DEc2.Text = "NG"
                srcSAB_BArcode_DEc2.BackColor = Color.Red
                NG()
            End If
        End If                                                                   ' ← wStep 판정 끝
    Catch ex As Exception
        Serial_Scanner_DIVE.DiscardInBuffer()
    End Try

End Sub
```

**핵심 부분:**
- **줄 2427**: `If wStep2 = 8 Then` - wStep 판정 시작
- **줄 2428**: `If ScanData.Contains(srcSAB_BArcode_Target2.Text) = True Then` - 타겟 바코드 확인
- **줄 2429~2433**: 중복체크 - 중복이면 "중복" 표시
- **줄 2434~2438**: 정상이면 "OK" 표시
- **줄 2440~2445**: 타겟 미일치 - "NG" 표시

---

## 3. ThreadTaskAtlasTool1 - Serial_Tool OTHER 토크 판정 (wStep1 체크)

**줄 2607~2634: ThreadTaskAtlasTool1()의 토크 판정 블록**

```vb
If wStep1 = 9 And srcSAB_BArcode_DEc.Text = "OK" Then                ' ← wStep 체크 시작
    If srcSAB_TQ1_DEC.Text <> "OK" And srcSAB_TQ2_DEC.Text <> "OK" Then
        srcSAB_TQ1.Text = CStr(ToolData)
        If ToolData >= BASIC_SAB_TQ_MIN And ToolData <= BASIC_SAB_TQ_MAX And ToolDecision = "OK" Then
            srcSAB_TQ1_DEC.Text = "OK"
            srcSAB_TQ1_DEC.BackColor = Color.Blue
            DingDOng()
        Else
            srcSAB_TQ1_DEC.Text = "NG"
            srcSAB_TQ1_DEC.BackColor = Color.Red
            NG()
        End If
    ElseIf srcSAB_TQ1_DEC.Text = "OK" And srcSAB_TQ2_DEC.Text <> "OK" Then
        srcSAB_TQ2.Text = CStr(ToolData)
        If ToolData >= BASIC_SAB_TQ_MIN And ToolData <= BASIC_SAB_TQ_MAX And ToolDecision = "OK" Then
            srcSAB_TQ2_DEC.Text = "OK"
            srcSAB_TQ2_DEC.BackColor = Color.Blue
            srcSAB_TQ_DEc.Text = "OK"
            srcSAB_TQ_DEc.BackColor = Color.Blue
            DingDOng()
        Else
            srcSAB_TQ2_DEC.Text = "NG"
            srcSAB_TQ2_DEC.BackColor = Color.Red
            NG()
        End If
    End If

End If                                                               ' ← wStep 체크 끝
```

---

## 4. ThreadTaskAtlasTool2 - Serial_Tool DIVE 토크 판정 (wStep2 체크)

**줄 2676~2703: ThreadTaskAtlasTool2()의 토크 판정 블록**

```vb
If wStep2 = 9 And srcSAB_BArcode_DEc2.Text = "OK" Then              ' ← wStep 체크 시작
    If srcSAB_TQ3_DEC.Text <> "OK" And srcSAB_TQ4_DEC.Text <> "OK" Then
        srcSAB_TQ3.Text = CStr(ToolData)
        If ToolData >= BASIC_SAB_TQ_MIN And ToolData <= BASIC_SAB_TQ_MAX And ToolDecision = "OK" Then
            srcSAB_TQ3_DEC.Text = "OK"
            srcSAB_TQ3_DEC.BackColor = Color.Blue
            DingDOng()
        Else
            srcSAB_TQ3_DEC.Text = "NG"
            srcSAB_TQ3_DEC.BackColor = Color.Red
            NG()
        End If
    ElseIf srcSAB_TQ3_DEC.Text = "OK" And srcSAB_TQ4_DEC.Text <> "OK" Then
        srcSAB_TQ4.Text = CStr(ToolData)
        If ToolData >= BASIC_SAB_TQ_MIN And ToolData <= BASIC_SAB_TQ_MAX And ToolDecision = "OK" Then
            srcSAB_TQ4_DEC.Text = "OK"
            srcSAB_TQ4_DEC.BackColor = Color.Blue
            srcSAB_TQ_DEc2.Text = "OK"
            srcSAB_TQ_DEc2.BackColor = Color.Blue
            DingDOng()
        Else
            srcSAB_TQ4_DEC.Text = "NG"
            srcSAB_TQ4_DEC.BackColor = Color.Red
            NG()
        End If
    End If

End If                                                               ' ← wStep 체크 끝
```

## 정리

| 항목 | 함수명 | wStep | 줄번호 | 판정 기준 |
|------|--------|-------|--------|----------|
| 바코드 1 | Serial_Scanner_Other_DataReceived | wStep1=8 | 2464-2483 | Contains(Target) + FLAG_SAB_DUP |
| 바코드 2 | Serial_Scanner_DIVE_DataReceived | wStep2=8 | 2427-2446 | Contains(Target) + FLAG_SAB_DUP |
| 토크 1 | ThreadTaskAtlasTool1 | wStep1=9 | 2607-2634 | BASIC_SAB_TQ_MIN/MAX + ToolDecision="OK" |
| 토크 2 | ThreadTaskAtlasTool2 | wStep2=9 | 2676-2703 | BASIC_SAB_TQ_MIN/MAX + ToolDecision="OK" |
